content:
Post 1
ASX 200 closed at 8,764.20, up 0.18% (+15.50 points). Gold stocks drove the session as bullion demand lifted miners. Weekly loss of 0.73% keeps the index flat year to date. #ASX #ausbiz #gold

Post 2
Utilities +1.01% and Materials +0.81% led. Health Care -1.30% and IT -1.17% dragged. Defensive rotation dominated as growth names sold off. #ASX #ausbiz #materials #healthcare

Post 3
KCN surged 4.46% to AUD 5.39. RMS +3.81% to AUD 3.00. Gold miners swept the top five gainers. Lithium was the mirror image — PLS -6.32%, LTR -5.68%. #ASX #gold #lithium #mining

Post 4
Gold bid at AUD 5,869.40/oz. Silver at AUD 84.73/oz. Platinum AUD 2,404.68/oz. AUD/USD at 0.6887. Precious metals strength underpinned the Materials sector rally. #gold #silver #commodities #ASX

Post 5
Watch gold in AUD terms. A hold above AUD 5,869/oz keeps miners bid. Any AUD strength through 0.69 compresses that price fast. Gold equities follow. #ASX #gold #ausbiz #FX
